title: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Ajaccien
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Ajaccien is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Ajaccio. It is located in the Corse-du-Sud department, in the Corsica region, southeastern France. Created in 2001, its seat is in Ajaccio. Its area is 268.8 km2. Its population was 91,202 in 2021, of which 73,822 in Ajaccio proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Ajaccien is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the city of Ajaccio. It is located in the Corse-du-Sud department, in the Corsica region, southeastern France. Created in 2001, its seat is in Ajaccio. Its area is 268.8 km2. Its population was 91,202 in 2021, of which 73,822 in Ajaccio proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 10 communes:
